MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Gerald Ragan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Rhonda Fung. Aaron L. Swickard, Esq. for Plaintiff. Also present, Angelina Melnikoff, Operations Manager. Based on the evidence presented, the Court signs the judgment. (see imaged document).
